transcript:
CALLER: Hello, meri beti ko allergy test karwana hai. Kisi allergist se milna tha.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Beti ka naam aur umar?
CALLER: Tanisha Verma. 9 saal ki hai. Mera number hai 9712345670.
AGENT: Shukriya. Dr. Anita Saraf paediatrics mein allergies bhi dekhti hain. Woh is week Saturday ko available hain — subah 10 baje ka slot hai.
CALLER: Saturday 10 baje theek hai. Book kar dijiye.
AGENT: Ho gaya! Tanisha Verma, Saturday 10 AM, Dr. Anita Saraf. SMS aayega. Kuch aur help chahiye?
CALLER: Nahi, bohot shukriya.
